title: CodeSetSchema
description: Describes the structure of CodeItem.attributes for a particular CodeSet. The 'json_schema' field holds an arbitrary JSON Schema draft-07 document used at write-time to validate CodeItem.attributes. See SPEC §2.2 etap 1 and §3.4.

version.description: Monotonically increasing schema revision. Bumped when a Schema Designer publishes a structural change.

json_schema.description: Arbitrary JSON Schema (draft-07) describing CodeItem.attributes shape and constraints.
